business.name: Albritton Heating & Air
business.tagline: Keeping Wilmington comfortable since day one

hero.headline: When your AC quits on the *hottest day*, we show up
hero.subheadline: Same-day service in Wilmington. 209 five-star reviews don't lie — we fix it right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: AC, Heat, and Everything Between
services_section.subheading: We repair what others want to replace

services.title: Air Conditioning Repair
services.description: When it's 95 degrees and your unit just stopped — we're the call you make. Quick diagnosis, honest fixes, back to cool air.

services.title: Heating System Service
services.description: From heat pumps to gas furnaces, we keep Wilmington warm when the temperature drops. Fast response, fair pricing.

services.title: Complete System Installation
services.description: New construction or full replacement — we size it right, install it clean, and make sure it runs perfectly from day one.

services.title: Emergency HVAC Service
services.description: System down at 2am? We answer the phone. Hot summer nights and cold winter mornings don't wait for business hours.

about.heading: 10 Years of Fixing What Others Want to Replace
about.body: Mr. Albritton and his team have been keeping Wilmington comfortable for over a decade. We're the company your neighbors recommend because we actually try to fix your unit instead of selling you a new one. Quick response, honest assessment, fair pricing. That's how we earned 209 five-star reviews.

reviews.name: Dawn D.
reviews.text: Quick callback, worked me into the schedule, and Carlton was awesome. Fixed it fast and professionally.

reviews.name: Hal L.
reviews.text: Two friends recommended Albritton — best advice I got. Ryan was prompt, thorough, and fair pricing.

reviews.name: Polly B.
reviews.text: Arrived early, fixed my AC quickly, communicates well. Inspires trust and committed to service.

reviews.name: Robert M.
reviews.text: 10 years with Albritton — they fix instead of selling new units. Most personable HVAC company around.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Wilmington
service_areas.subheading: Fast response across the Cape Fear region

cta.heading: AC Down? Heat Out? We Answer.
cta.body: Same-day service in Wilmington. Call now for fast, honest HVAC repair that actually fixes the problem.
